summary: Iteration 11 - Multi-Instrument Trading & New News Sources Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests passed. All 4 instrument cards visible in Settings > Trading tab. All 9 news source options visible in Settings > Advanced tab, including the 3 new free sources (NDTV Profit, CNBC TV18, Livemint).

issues:
Minor: HTML hydration warning - Badge inside

tag on Trading tab (cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all instrument cards and news source options verified)

test_credentials: None required - uses public preview URL
seed_data_creation: Using existing news data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-instrument trading and 3 new news sources fully tested and working. App is in LIVE TRADING mode with Upstox disconnected. News sources CNBC TV18 (7 articles) and NDTV Profit (2 articles) are already fetching data. Livemint is configured but may need time to accumulate articles due to deduplication.

multi_instrument_trading.description: 4 instruments available: NIFTY50, BANKNIFTY, FINNIFTY, MIDCPNIFTY

api_verified.GET /api/instruments: Returns all 4 instruments with correct details (lot_size, strike_step, option_premium, base_price, exchange)
api_verified.POST /api/instruments/set: Correctly changes active instrument and persists to settings
api_verified.POST /api/instruments/set (invalid): Returns error with list of available instruments

multi_instrument_trading.ui_verified: Settings > Trading tab shows 4 instrument cards with selection checkmarks

new_news_sources.description: 3 new free news sources added: NDTV Profit, CNBC TV18, Livemint

api_verified.GET /api/settings: Shows news sources configuration including new sources
api_verified.POST /api/settings/update: Can update news sources including new ones
api_verified.GET /api/news/latest: Returns articles from configured sources (CNBC TV18: 7, NDTV Profit: 2 in DB)

new_news_sources.ui_verified: Settings > Advanced tab shows all 9 news source options with checkboxes, new sources (ndtv_profit, cnbc_tv18, livemint) are selected

instrument_persistence.description: Instrument selection persists via /api/instruments/set and is stored in settings_manager

api_verification.GET /api/instruments: 200 OK - returns 4 instruments with details (NIFTY50, BANKNIFTY, FINNIFTY, MIDCPNIFTY)
api_verification.POST /api/instruments/set (INVALID): 200 OK - returns error with available instruments list
api_verification.GET /api/settings: 200 OK - shows trading_instrument and news.sources config
api_verification.GET /api/news/latest: 200 OK - returns articles from CNBC TV18, NDTV Profit, Economic Times, Moneycontrol

ui_verification.settings_trading_tab: 4 instrument cards visible (NIFTY 50, BANK NIFTY, FIN NIFTY, MIDCAP NIFTY) with lot size, step, and premium info
ui_verification.settings_advanced_tab: 9 news source options visible with descriptions and checkboxes. 3 new sources (NDTV Profit, CNBC TV18, Livemint) marked as 'Free' with check marks
